news.title: Crypto catches its breath as bitcoin settles into a holding pattern amid July rally
Live markets: Bitcoin trades above $65,000 as Alphabet's bigger AI bill props up the chip trade
‘Not currently the right capital solution’: Smarter Web sells 178 bitcoin to repay $11.7M convertible instrument
news.summary: The Smarter Web Company sold 177.89 BTC at $65,762 to repay $11.7 million to TOBAM early, cancelling 7.7 million in potential share issuance.

news.title: Circle partners with Kakao, Toss Bank to explore stablecoin payment rails in South Korea
news.summary: Circle plans to explore blockchain-based payment infrastructure in South Korea through partnerships with Kakao and Toss.

news.title: Arbitrum Perp DEX AFX Trade Drained of $24M, Offers Hacker 30% to Return It
news.summary: The exploit hit a custody bridge AFX operates rather than the Arbitrum network itself, with the stolen funds quickly moved to Ethereum.

news.title: Bitcoin will get ‘lift’ from Hyperliquid, Robinhood in next crypto bull market: Bitwise exec
news.summary: Bitwise predicted that Hyperliquid and Robinhood TradFi ventures should form the basis for a crypto bull-market comeback that would lift Bitcoin and Ether.

news.title: Coinbase to expand Singapore office headcount by 25%: report
news.summary: Coinbase plans to expand its Singapore office from 150 to about 200 employees by the end of 2026 as it grows its presence in the Lion City.

news.title: Bitcoin may have bottomed before its traditional cycle low: Grayscale’s Pandl
news.summary: Grayscale’s head of research said that Bitcoin may have bottomed, arguing that macro factors, such as interest rate decisions as increasingly driving the price action of this maturing asset class.

news.title: 字节Seed招募100名学者：提供算力、AI 团队协作和薪酬
news.summary:
【字节Seed招募100名学者：提供算力、AI 团队协作和薪酬】金色财经报道，7月23日消息，字节跳动 Seed 启动 STEM 科学家计划，拟邀请 100 位前沿科学领域学者。参与者将与 Seed 团队合作约 6 个月，用 AI 解决真实科研问题。 参与方式分为科学家顾问和博士实习生。前者面向高校学者和行业专家，后者面向 STEM 领域在读博士。申请者需在科研中深度使用 AI，熟练编程者优先。 Seed 将提供算力、AI 团队协作和薪酬。项目需到北京海淀现场参与，申请截至 2026 年 9 月 30 日。

原文链接: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/iQYk146vy_2mO5PgfgsFxg
